description_long: This is an open book displayed on a flat, reddish-brown book stand with a green underlay. The pages are filled with dense, black Arabic script, suggesting it is a religious or literary text. The book's pages are slightly curved, and the paper appears to be of medium thickness with a smooth finish. The book stand is simple and functional, providing stable support for the open book. The cover edges visible beneath the pages are green, contrasting with the reddish-brown stand. No visible illustrations or decorative elements are present on the cover or spine.
description: An open book with Arabic script, supported by a reddish-brown stand and a green underlay, with no visible cover illustration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with Arabic script, green cover edges, and reddish-brown stand clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the book, the curvature of the pages, and the layered appearance of the green cover and reddish-brown stand.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the V-shape formed by the open pages and the full width of the reddish-brown stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the book's thickness and the layered covers, with the green and reddish-brown colors prominent.
